statement: NVIDIA is launching a new revenue-sharing and credit-support business model that lets AI clouds procure NVIDIA infrastructure, expanding compute access to startups, model builders, enterprises, research organizations and regional AI players.
why: Financing has been a bottleneck for capital-intensive AI infrastructure; NVIDIA's revenue-share and credit-support model unlocks financing and expands its addressable demand while adding a share of cloud revenue on top of standard product revenue.

impact.mechanism: Revenue-sharing and credit support unlock financing for AI-cloud buildouts, pulling through more NVIDIA GPU sales and adding a recurring cloud-revenue share.

evidence.excerpt: NVIDIA is introducing a new business model that opens up compute access to the fast-growing AI ecosystem of startups, model builders, enterprises, research organizations and regional AI players

confidence.basis: Single vendor blog (secondary), qualitative announcement without figures.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: statement/trend changed (trend rising -> rising); sources: NVIDIA Blog / Newsroom
